proposed_relations.description: Bus bulbs at SBS stations on Webster Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus Bulbs extend the sidewalk out to the bus lane at SBS stations, creating additional space for bus riders and pedestrians
1. Bus Bulbs: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane. Buses will not need to pull in and out of traffic. Higher curbs on the SBS platform will allow for easier boarding.

decisions.rationale: The Fall 2012 Webster Avenue SBS Newsletter describes bus bulbs explicitly as part of the proposed SBS station design for Webster Avenue. Block p001_c0008 sits under the heading 'Proposed Design for SBS on Webster Avenue' and block p002_c0009 sits under 'Preliminary Design of SBS Stations,' directly linking bus bulbs to the Webster Avenue SBS project.

proposed_relations.description: Dedicated offset bus lanes on Webster Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: Dedicated Bus (& Right Turn) Lanes: Offset bus lanes allow buses to move quickly while preserving parking
Parking along the curb except at bus stops

decisions.rationale: Blocks p001_c0010 and p001_c0011 sit under the heading 'Proposed Design for SBS on Webster Avenue' (p001_c0007). They describe dedicated offset bus lanes as part of the Webster Avenue SBS project design, with parking preserved along the curb except at bus stops.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Dedicated Bus (& Right Turn) Lanes: Offset bus lanes allow buses to move quickly while preserving parking
Parking along the curb except at bus stops

proposed_relations.description: Transit Signal Priority at certain intersections on Webster Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: Transit Signal Priority (Not Pictured): Buses will get an extended green light at certain intersections, reducing stop time at red lights

decisions.rationale: Block p001_c0013 sits under the heading 'Proposed Design for SBS on Webster Avenue' (p001_c0007). It describes Transit Signal Priority as a feature of the Webster Avenue SBS project, giving buses extended green lights at certain intersections.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Transit Signal Priority (Not Pictured): Buses will get an extended green light at certain intersections, reducing stop time at red lights

proposed_relations.description: Pedestrian amenities including curb extensions, safety islands, and medians on Webster Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: Pedestrian Amenities: Curb extensions, pedestrian safety islands, and medians will make intersections safer

decisions.rationale: Block p001_c0009 sits under the heading 'Proposed Design for SBS on Webster Avenue' (p001_c0007). It describes pedestrian amenities—curb extensions, pedestrian safety islands, and medians—as part of the Webster Avenue SBS project design to make intersections safer.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Pedestrian Amenities: Curb extensions, pedestrian safety islands, and medians will make intersections safer

proposed_relations.description: Off-board fare collection machines at Webster Avenue SBS stations

evidence_refs.source_quote: 3. Fare Collection Machines: Customers pay their fare at the SBS stop before they board, shortening the time that buses are stopped.

decisions.rationale: Block p002_c0009 sits under the heading 'Preliminary Design of SBS Stations' (p002_c0007) and within the section 'Project Update' of the Webster Avenue SBS Newsletter. It describes fare collection machines as item 3 of the SBS station design, directly linking off-board fare payment to the Webster Avenue SBS project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 3. Fare Collection Machines: Customers pay their fare at the SBS stop before they board, shortening the time that buses are stopped.

proposed_relations.description: New bus shelters at Webster Avenue SBS stations

decisions.rationale: Block p002_c0009 sits under the heading 'Preliminary Design of SBS Stations' (p002_c0007) within the Project Update section of the Webster Avenue SBS Newsletter. It lists new bus shelters as item 2 of the SBS station design, directly linking them to the Webster Avenue SBS project.
